articles.title: Doing this throughout life may cut Alzheimer’s risk by 38%

articles.title: Lonely people have worse memory but don’t decline faster, study finds

articles.title: Your nose could detect Alzheimer’s years before symptoms begin

articles.title: Scientists say we’ve been treating Alzheimer’s all wrong

articles.title: Scientists discover hidden gut trigger behind ALS and dementia

articles.title: AI Identifies Appendix Removal and Diet as Alzheimer’s Risks
articles.excerpt: A massive AI study identifies appendix removal and long-term gut microbiome disruption as key drivers of Alzheimer’s risk.

articles.title: Heartbeat Rhythms Unveil Hidden Brain Activity

articles.title: Midlife Hobbies Outperform Genetic Alzheimer’s Risk

articles.title: AI Voices Outperform Human Speech in Noisy Environments
